name: Funnel Cake or Plowlines
recipeIngredient: Fat or oil for deep frying
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs with milk and gradually beat in flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder until very smooth.
2. Holding the opening of a funnel closed, fill the funnel with the batter.
3. Open the end of the funnel and allow dough to run out in a stream into deep hot fat (375).
4. Move the funnel to make a pattern, starting at the center of the pan and swirling batter outward in a circle.
5. Fry for 2 or 3 minutes, or until brown.
6. Drain on absorbent paper and sprinkle with confectioners sugar.
7. Makes about 30 cakes, depending on size.
